tech_news.title: Chrome’s AI features may be hogging 4GB of your computer storage - The Verge
tech_news.description: Chrome users are discovering that Google is installing a 4GB weights.bin file inside their browser directory when certain AI browser features are enabled.

tech_news.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests - The Verge
